musics.title: The Long And Winding Road
musics.lyrics:
[Primeira Parte] 

     Cm                   G#/A#
The long and winding road
      D#    D#/C#    G#
That leads to your door
      Gm7  Cm       Cm/A#
Will never disappear
Fm7                 A#7      D#7 (Frase 1)
    I've seen that road before
G#   Gm7    Cm           Cm/A# 
  It always leads me here
Fm7         A#7     D#
   Lead me to your door

[Segunda Parte] 

     Cm                  G#/A#
The wild and windy night
          D#    D#/C#  G#
That the rain washed away
     Gm7   Cm           Cm/A#
Has left a pool of tears
Fm7        A#7     D#7 (Frase 1)
   Crying for the day
G#     Gm7      Cm           Cm/A# 
  Why leave me standing here?
Fm7         A#7     D#
   Let me know the way

[Terceira Parte] 

 D#/G            G#
Many times I've been alone
     Gm7             Fm7  A#7
And many times I've cried
Página 1 / 3
D#             G#
Anyway you've never known
     Gm7             Fm7  A#7
The many ways I've tried

[Quarta Parte] 

      Cm                    G#/A#
But still they lead me back
        D#   D#/C#    G#
To the long winding road
     Gm7     Cm          Cm/A#
You left me standing here
Fm7        A#7        D#7 (Frase)
   A long long time ago
G#       Gm7     Cm          Cm/A#
  Don't leave me waiting here
Fm7         A#7     D#
   Lead me to your door

[Instrumental]

D# G# Gm7  Fm7  A#7  
D#  (Frase 2)

[Quarta Parte] 

      Cm                    G#/A#
But still they lead me back
        D#   D#/C#    G#
To the long winding road
     Gm7     Cm          Cm/A#
You left me standing here
Fm7        A#7        D#7 (Frase)
   A long long time ago
G#       Gm7     Cm          Cm/A#
  Don't leave me waiting here
Fm7         A#7     D#
   Lead me to your door
G#/A#               D#
    Yeah yeah yeah yeah
